title: Audit Services in Jammu and Kashmir | Virtual Auditor
description: Audit Services in Jammu and Kashmir. From ₹25,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit. Contact +91 99622
bodyText:
What is statutory audit & assurance services? Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit, concurrent audit, and stock audit by FCA-led practice.
Statutory Audit & Assurance Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Jammu and Kashmir, Jammu and Kashmir since 2012.
Quick Answer: Audit Services in Jammu and Kashmir — Statutory audit, tax audit (44AB), internal audit, GST audit, concurrent audit, and stock audit by F. From ₹25,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Statutory Audit & Assurance Services in Jammu and Kashmir
Virtual Auditor provides statutory audit & assurance services across Jammu and Kashmir. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Jammu and Kashmir with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Jammu handles company registrations and filings for Jammu and Kashmir. Stamp duty: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Jammu and Kashmir

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: All companies registered under Companies Act must get audited annually. LLPs with turnover >₹40L or capital >₹25L also require audit.
Tax audit is required when business turnover exceeds ₹1 crore (₹10 crore if cash transactions <5%) or professional receipts exceed ₹50 lakhs.

faqs.q: How long does an audit take?
faqs.a: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on company size. We provide a detailed timeline at engagement stage.

faqs.q: Do you provide audit services services in Jammu and Kashmir?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Jammu and Kashmir from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Jammu and Kashmir?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Jammu and Kashmir fall under ROC Jammu. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Jammu and Kashmir-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Jammu and Kashmir?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Jammu and Kashmir: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
